_note: Fixture for eval 2 — same Settlement Management Platform Epic but with 2 Features already created as sub-issues. Tests that the skill does not re-propose existing Features, explicitly acknowledges them, and proposes only the remaining Features.

epic.title: Epic: Settlement Management Platform
epic.body:
## Goal
Merchants can track, filter, and export their settlement history. Finance Managers can generate consolidated reports across all merchants and flag anomalies.

## Context
The settlement domain currently has no self-service visibility. Merchants open support tickets to query settlement status. Finance Managers use spreadsheet exports manually assembled from the payments database. Both workflows are slow, error-prone, and do not scale.

## Domain Actors
- **Merchant** — a business receiving payouts from the platform
- **Finance Manager** — an internal operator responsible for cross-merchant financial oversight

## Success Metrics
- Merchant can view real-time settlement status for any completed payment
- Merchant can filter their settlement history by date range
- Finance Manager can export a cross-merchant settlement report
- System notifies Merchant when a settlement is delayed beyond the expected window
- Finance Manager can flag anomalous settlements for review

## Bounded Context
Settlement

existing_features.title: Merchant can filter settlements by date range
